---
title: "Contact"
---

<img src="images/main_logo.png" class="centered-image">

## Sysop

Ian Henry  
Callsign: G0LFT 
 - **Email:** [ian@g0lft.org](mailto:ian@g0lft.org)
 - **QRZ Page:** [G0LFT](https://www.qrz.com/db/G0LFT) 

---

## System

GB7CAM Packet Node

---

## Reporting Issues

Contact the sysop for:
- connectivity problems
- forwarding issues
- node linking requests
